Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for sensitive accounts from the Sensitive_Users tabular list

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing from host {src.host} for sensitive account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password bruteforcing attempts from host {src.host} for sensitive account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
